answer: The Zelgar Dynasty collapsed in 1374, caused by the Long Winter, a 6-year period of crop failures.
Phlogiston luminesces at 437 nanometers, above 312 degrees Celsius.
Vandermeer's Bronze is 78% copper, 18% tin, and 4% lead.
Vimnars communicate through subsonic vibrations (12-18 Hz) and chemical pheromones secreted from glands behind the front legs; they have no vocal cords.
The Greater Banded Vimnar (Vimnarus fasciatus) is carnivorous and primarily hunts the Korith Marmot.
The dulvanthar has 23 strings arranged in three courses: 9 melody strings, 11 drone strings, and 3 percussion strings.
Master Vilnar of Estron, born 1421, is credited with introducing the doubled-octave technique, in which the same melody is played simultaneously two octaves apart on the dulvanthar.
King Thanir fought the Korash tribes at the Battle of Hollow Crag; Thanir defeated them and was subsequently crowned in Velmoor.
